articles.summary: 针对GRPO在GUI Grounding中单视图采样导致组内无相对优势的问题，提出VISTA框架，从多视图构建比较组进行自验证训练，提升指令定位的准确性。

First, at the co
articles.summary: 将LLM从对话生成器向持久自主AI系统转变概念化为「数字同事」，沿推理、行动、记忆与自我改进两个维度组织过渡，推动AI从回答走向持续工作。

articles.title: HarnessX: A Composable, Adaptive, and Evolvable Agent Harness Foundry
articles.excerpt: AI agent performance depends critically on the runtime harness, comprising the prompts, tools, memory, and control flow that mediate how a model observes, reasons, and acts. Yet today's harnesses remain largely hand-crafted and static: each new model or task still demands bespoke scaffolding, and the rich traces produced during execution are rarely distilled back into systematic improvement. We in
articles.summary: 指出AI agent运行时框架（prompt、工具、记忆、控制流）目前静态且需手工定制，提出HarnessX可组合自适应进化框架，能够从执行轨迹中系统改进。

articles.title: μ_0: A Scalable 3D Interaction-Trace World Model
articles.excerpt: World models that capture how actions induce physical change enable scalable robot learning without reliance on embodiment-specific action labels. Pixel-space video models provide broad visual priors but expend model capacity on dense appearance reconstruction, while direct action models require embodiment-specific labels that hinder scalability. We present μ_0, a scalable world model based on 3D
articles.summary: 提出μ0世界模型，基于3D交互跟踪而非像素重建，无需动作标签即可预测物理变化，实现可扩展的机器人学习。

articles.title: InterleaveThinker: Reinforcing Agentic Interleaved Generation
articles.excerpt: Recent image generators have demonstrated impressive photorealism and instruction-following capabilities in single-image generation and editing. Even the latest open-source Unified Multimodal Models
articles.summary: 针对现有图像生成器无法进行文本-图像交错生成，提出InterleaveThinker强化学习方法，在统一多模态模型上实现序列生成，应用于视觉叙事与具身操作。

Tool-augmented agents attempt to address this by augmenting VLMs with specialist perception modules, yet their effectiveness is bounded by the action interface through which those tools are invoked. In this work, we study how th
articles.summary: 研究工具增强VLM的空间推理，指出动作接口是瓶颈。提出SpatialClaw重新设计接口，提升3D物体定位与关系理解效果。

articles.summary: 提出机器人操作世界模型WEAVER，同时满足保真度（模拟轨迹与真实相关）、一致性与长期预测，支持策略评估与测试时规划。

articles.title: MoVerse: Real-Time Video World Modeling with Panoramic Gaussian Scaffold
articles.excerpt: We present MoVerse, a real-time video world model that creates an interactively navigable scene from a single narrow-field-of-view image. articles.title: 少子化加劇競爭？「高考神話破滅」下的中國青年
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/少子化加劇競爭？「高考神話破滅」下的中國青年/a-77522265?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
